title: Build an app from your phone in AI Studio
summary: Google AI Studio is a web-based platform that allows developers to build custom applications directly from a mobile browser using voice commands and APIs. The tutorial shows how to create an image-generation app without installing software, leveraging AI to generate code in real time.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial demonstrates building a custom application in Google AI Studio entirely from a mobile browser, with no software installation required. It walks through creating an image-generation app using voice commands and APIs, with AI generating the code in real time. The takeaway: AI Studio supports a web-based, voice-driven workflow that produces working code on demand, including from a phone.
